bluetooth_confirm.title: Add {name}
bluetooth_confirm.description: **{name}** was found nearby. Tap **Submit** to begin setup.

key_retrieval.title: Connect to Napoleon Home
key_retrieval.description: Enter your Napoleon app account credentials to retrieve the local key for **{name}**.

factory_reset_guide.title: Factory reset required
factory_reset_guide.description:
**{name}** is already provisioned and no longer accepts new Bluetooth bonds.

To add this grill to Home Assistant you must first factory reset it:

1. On the grill, hold the **Menu** and **Select** buttons simultaneously until the display resets
2. The grill will return to its factory state
3. Tap **Continue** — you will then be guided through provisioning

provision_guide.title: Provision your grill
provision_guide.description:
**{name}** hasn't been set up yet.

1. Open the **Napoleon** app on your phone
2. Add and provision the grill (follow the in-app instructions)
3. Once setup is complete, **close the Napoleon app**
4. Return here and tap **Continue**

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Napoleon Home
reauth_confirm.description: The local key for {name} needs to be refreshed. Enter your Napoleon app account credentials.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Check your Napoleon app email and password.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Napoleon cloud. Check your internet connection.
error.no_devices_found: No Napoleon Prestige grills found in your account.
error.already_bonded: Grill no longer accepts new Bluetooth bonds — factory reset the grill first.
error.ble_not_provisioned: Grill is not provisioned — please complete setup in the Napoleon app first.
error.ble_discovery_required: Couldn't determine the grill Bluetooth address. Start setup from Bluetooth discovery by powering on the grill and adding it when detected.
error.ble_key_rejected: BLE key rejected by grill — the local key may have rotated. Try reauthenticating.
error.ble_auth_failed: Failed to connect to the grill via Bluetooth. Ensure the grill is powered on and within range.
error.reset_not_detected: Grill is still bonded to another device. Confirm the factory reset completed (hold ignition ~10 s until the grill beeps) then try again.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This Napoleon Home grill is already configured.
abort.device_added_to_account: The Napoleon Home grill has been added to your existing account.
abort.discovery_required: This integration can only be added via Bluetooth discovery. Power on your grill and it will appear automatically.
abort.not_supported: This device is not a Napoleon grill.

data_description.poll_interval: How often to request a full property update from the grill while connected.

add_grill.title: Add Napoleon Home grill
add_grill.description: Enter your Napoleon app account password to add another grill ({username}).

pick_grill.title: Select grill
pick_grill.description: Multiple unconfigured Napoleon Prestige grills were found. Select the one to add.

remove_grill.title: Remove Napoleon Home grill
remove_grill.description: Select the grill to remove from Home Assistant.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Check your Napoleon app email and password.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Napoleon cloud. Check your internet connection.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.grill_added: The Napoleon Home grill has been added.
abort.grill_removed: The Napoleon Home grill has been removed.
abort.no_devices_found: No unconfigured Napoleon Prestige grills found in your account.

update_failed.message: Failed to poll properties from the Napoleon Home grill.

ble_auth_rejected.message: BLE key rejected by grill — the local key has rotated. Please reauthenticate.

confirm.title: Restore connection to {name}
confirm.description: {name} is rejecting BLE connection (ATT 0x05) — it has been bonded to another device. Factory reset the grill, then click Submit to restore the connection.

confirm.title: Restore connection to {name}
confirm.description: {name} reports it is not provisioned (s:6). Open the Napoleon app and provision the grill, then click Submit to restore the connection.
